title: ononis pubescens subsp. paniculata
intro: Ononis pubescens subsp. paniculata, also known as the hairy restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to various parts of the world, including Europe and Asia. The hairy restharrow plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. This plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The hairy restharrow can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
